final_hash_record_policy: Do not embed the self-referential final commit hash in this file; use terminal git rev-parse and git ls-remote output after push.

data_boundary.formal_source_policy: Only real MetaDatabase/PFI derived data or Chinese empty states may be used for formal financial surfaces.
data_boundary.forbidden_financial_data_policy: No mock/sample/synthetic/fixture/demo/fake financial data is added or used as delivery evidence.

review_findings.finding: v0.2.4 had Stage 0-9 and Stage 9 upload evidence but no project-level overall review gate.
review_findings.fix: Added overall project review module, contract test, document, evidence, audit, terminal log, changed files and rollback record.
review_findings.verification: test_v024_overall_project_review.py covers payload, artifacts, audit, stage evidence, accepted manual gates and status files.

review_findings.finding: Stage 8.3 and Stage 9.3 phase evidence intentionally preserve historical waiting states, which can be misread as blockers after user reply 1.
review_findings.fix: Overall review binds whole-stage review and upload evidence as the authoritative acceptance source and records both user confirmations explicitly.
review_findings.verification: Overall contract requires Stage 8.3 and Stage 9.3 user confirmation by chat_reply_1 and audit marks both non-blocking.

review_findings.finding: Project-level completion needed a fresh remote-main terminal verification, not only per-stage upload evidence.
review_findings.fix: Overall review gate includes final push and terminal remote verification policy.
review_findings.verification: Post-commit terminal proof must show HEAD, origin/main and remote main equal.

review_findings.finding: Full v0.2.4 regression exposed stale historical assertions: Stage 3 expected the final runtime body marker to remain Stage 3, and Stage 7 expected historical run-contract anchors that had been overwritten by later gates.
review_findings.fix: Updated the Stage 3 test to validate that the Stage 3 navigation contract remains mounted while allowing the final runtime stage marker to be Stage 6, and restored Stage 7 historical anchors in RUN_CONTRACT.
review_findings.verification: Full v0.2.4 pytest now passes with 218 passed.

commands.cmd: pytest v024 overall project review red run
commands.detail: 4 failed before implementation: missing stage_v024_overall_project_review module, OVERALL_PROJECT_REVIEW.md, overall evidence pack and status anchors
overall project review contract passed as part of full v0.2.4 pytest
post-rebase final run: 218 passed in 3.01s after fixing Stage 3 historical test drift and Stage 7 run-contract anchors
py_compile overall module and json.tool checks exited 0
changed_files.txt matches git diff plus untracked PFI files
origin/main advanced by KM_IDSystem-only commit 92fd9c5f; WIP was stashed, rebased and restored with no PFI remote conflict
origin/main advanced by OpenAIDatabase-only commits through e03587a9; WIP was stashed, rebased and restored with no PFI remote conflict
terminal gate pushes overall project review package to GitHub main; final hash verified after push outside this self-referential evidence file
